name: Marketing Agency #2: Proposal Generator Full (Data Table)

values.content: You are a senior business development strategist at Rensto, an AI automation agency. Generate professional, personalized proposal content. Be specific about deliverables and timelines. Use the enrichment data to tailor the proposal to their specific business needs.

assignments.name: leadCompany
assignments.value: ={{ $('Data Table - Get Qualified Leads').item.json.Company || $('Data Table - Get Qualified Leads').item.json.FullName }}

assignments.name: videoPrompt
assignments.value: =@shai-lfc in a stunning miniature world style. He presents a glowing holographic proposal for {{ $('Data Table - Get Qualified Leads').item.json.Company || $('Data Table - Get Qualified Leads').item.json.FullName }}. Coral and cyan colors, tilt-shift blur, Wes Anderson aesthetic. 4K quality.

assignments.name: proposalHtml
assignments.value:
={{ '' + ($json.videoUrl ? '

🎬 A personalized message from Shai

' : '') + '

Custom AI Automation Proposal

Prepared for ' + ($('Set - Proposal Data').item.json.leadCompany || '') + '

Executive Summary

' + ($('Set - Proposal Data').item.json.executiveSummary || '') + '

Proposed Solution

' + ($('Set - Proposal Data').item.json.proposedSolution || '') + '

Key Deliverables

' + (($('Set - Proposal Data').item.json.deliverables || []).map(d => '

' + d.title + '

' + d.description + '

').join('')) + '

Timeline

' + ($('Set - Proposal Data').item.json.timeline || '') + '

Investment

Setup: ' + (($('Set - Proposal Data').item.json.investment || {}).setup || '') + ' | Monthly: ' + (($('Set - Proposal Data').item.json.investment || {}).monthly || '') + '

Next Steps

    ' + (($('Set - Proposal Data').item.json.nextSteps || []).map(s => '
  1. ' + s + '
    2. ').join('')) + '
Schedule Your Strategy Call →

Rensto | AI-Powered Business Automation

' }}

assignments.name: emailSubject
assignments.value: =Your Custom AI Automation Proposal - {{ $('Set - Proposal Data').item.json.leadCompany }}

values.content: =You are a helpful sales advisor at Rensto. Write a short, warm follow-up email that addresses their specific question/need and gently guides them toward scheduling a discovery call. Keep it 2-3 sentences. End with a soft CTA.

assignments.name: subject
assignments.value: =Quick follow-up on your inquiry, {{ $('Data Table - Get Qualified Leads').item.json.FullName }}

assignments.name: body
assignments.value:
={{ '' + ($json.videoUrl ? '

🎬 A personalized message from Shai

' : '') + '

Following Up on Your Inquiry

Hi ' + ($('Data Table - Get Qualified Leads').item.json.FullName || 'there') + '!

Personal Note

' + ($('Nurture Email').item.json.output[0].content[0].text || 'Thank you for reaching out! We would love to help you automate and grow your business.') + '

Ready to Chat?

I\'d love to learn more about your business and explore how we can help you save time with automation.

Schedule a 15-min Discovery Call →

Rensto | AI-Powered Business Automation

Helping businesses automate and grow

' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'sora-2-pro-text-to-video', input: { prompt: $json.videoPrompt || '@shai-lfc in a stunning miniature world style. He presents a glowing holographic proposal. Coral and cyan colors, tilt-shift blur, Wes Anderson aesthetic. 4K quality.', aspect_ratio: 'landscape', n_frames: '10', size: 'high', remove_watermark: true } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'sora-2-pro-text-to-video', input: { prompt: '@shai-lfc in a whimsical miniature world style, like a tilt-shift diorama. He stands behind a tiny workbench in a colorful workshop with coral (#fe3d51) and cyan (#1eaef7) LEGO-style elements. He looks up at the camera with excited surprise, like he just noticed the viewer. He holds up a tiny glowing envelope with the viewer name on it, showing it proudly: "Made this for you!" expression. Text "' + ($('Data Table - Get Qualified Leads').item.json.FullName || 'Hey') + ', I made this for you" types on gently, clean white font. He gestures warmly toward camera as if inviting them into his tiny world. The whole scene has dreamy tilt-shift blur and a stop-motion Wes Anderson aesthetic. 4K quality.', aspect_ratio: 'landscape', n_frames: '15', size: 'high', remove_watermark: true } }) }}
